title: Life's Better 40oz Tumbler - Stainless Steel Vacuum Mug with Bonus 2 Steel Straws & Silicone Tips - Double Wall Travel Flask/Cup for Hot/Cold Drinks BPA-Free Sky Blue
features: Unrivaled Capacity: With a MAHOOSIVE 40oz (1.2-liter) capacity, El Gordo ensures you're never left thirsty. Whether you're conquering a long day at the office or embarking on an outdoor excursion, this tumbler has you covered.

Hot or Cold, Your Choice: Thanks to its advanced double-walled vacuum insulation, El Gordo can keep your beverages piping hot for up to 12 hours or refreshingly cold for an impressive 24 hours. Your coffee will stay warm during that early morning commute, and your iced juice will remain chilled on a scorching summer day.

Handle for Comfort: Designed with your convenience in mind, El Gordo features a sturdy handle that makes carrying and sipping on the go effortless. Whether you're hiking, driving, or just relaxing at home, this tumbler is a joy to hold.

Straw Lid for Convenience: The included straw lid not only prevents spills but also offers a hassle-free leak proof drinking experience. Say goodbye to fumbling with caps and enjoy your drink with ease.
Built to Last: Crafted from premium stainless steel, El Gordo is built to withstand the test of time. It's rust-resistant, corrosion-proof, and ready for all your adventures.

Eco-Friendly Choice: By choosing El Gordo, you're making a positive impact on the environment. This reusable tumbler helps reduce single-use plastic waste, making it a responsible choice for a healthier planet.

Bonus Accessories: We value your satisfaction, which is why we've included two stainless steel straws, two silicone tips, and a straw cleaning brush absolutely free. It's our way of enhancing your tumbler experience.

El Gordo isn't just a tumbler; it's a statement of quality, style, and sustainability. Whether you're sipping your morning coffee, hydrating after a workout, or enjoying an iced beverage on a road trip, El Gordo is your trusted companion. Upgrade your hydration routine and experience the difference Life's Better Ltd El Gordo 40oz Tumbler can make. Order yours today and discover why life truly is better with El Gordo by your side.
